'''Zut''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Phlog/Legends|Phlog]] who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. He was the mate of [[Dobah]] and the father of [[Hoom]] and [[Nahkee]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Zut was voiced by [[Joe Matheson]].

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|Rampage of the Phlogs}} {{1st}}
